global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and an oval shape in lighter shades of orange, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Savings message
elements.description: Text in bold white font stating 'Last-minute savings', centrally placed below the geometric shapes.

elements.label: Booking options
elements.description: Smaller text in white below the savings message, reading 'Flexible booking options'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small white text displaying the price '$4.99' positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in white, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The word 'WayPoint' in bold black font at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded edges containing the text 'Watch now' in white.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text showing the price '$4.99' in white, located at the bottom left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, last-minute savings, flexible booking options
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subject in the center, and CTA at the bottom.
